Parenting Podcasts: You Aren’t Alone!
When you follow someone online, you get glimpse into their life.
Suddenly instead feeling alone, you feel validated your decisions, and heck you might even learn something along the way!
Parenting podcasts offer this, and can help remind parents that whatever problem they’re facing, they’re not alone.
Listening into shows, reading people’s stories online, can feel like you’re eavesdropping their lives.
However being allowed peak in, you suddenly realise that lot things about parenting are universal.
all lot the things the same.
also lot things differently, and it’s always fascinating hear how others live their lives, and parent their children.
Whether you agree disagree, still makes for great conversation.
The Parenting View one these shows that has just started up, promising get conversations going about all things parenting.
Maria Foy, creator and host the podcast The Parenting View, says lot parents can get disillusioned what they see online, but with show like this, suddenly you’re exposed conversation that unfiltered.” She also goes say “No two people parent the same, and everybody’s life experiences are different which makes these kind conversations fascinating.

How often have you come across someone who told you that he/she had just broken up?
Most initial response will be, “You will find someone new.” And isn’t that true for most people eventually?
The ones that never found someone new, most probably they never allowed themselves start looking again after they went through the unhappy relationship.
